# EchoMQ command registry тАФ agent index

> Flat, token-minimal index of all 50 legacy Lua commands mapped v1тЖТv3, by the 12-feature taxonomy. Each line: `command тЖТ feature-slice#anchor тАФ STATUS ┬╖ v3 home ┬╖ [raw v1 .lua]`. Resolve one command to its v3 home, status, and full v1 source **without loading** the matrix or a feature file. Detail + the v1тЖТv3 side-by-side live once per command in its feature slice. Status: SHIPPED (ported) ┬╖ PARTIAL (shipped in part) ┬╖ NOT YET (proposed) ┬╖ RETIRED (dropped by design) ┬╖ BUILDING (`[RECONCILE]`, ahead of code).

## Entry points
- [emq.commands.registry.md](../emq.commands.registry.md): the 6-column summary matrix, one table per feature
- [features/](features/): per-feature detail slices (тЙд300 lines each) тАФ the v1тЖТv3 ASCII side-by-side lives here
- [registry/](registry/): the 50 raw v1 legacy Lua sources + `includes/` helpers (full text of every original)
- [taxonomy](../emq.epic.1.md): the authoritative commandтЖТfeature map (12 features)

## admission
- [addStandardJob-9](features/admission.md#addstandardjob-9) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.enqueue/4` (`@enqueue`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/addStandardJob-9.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.0

## scheduling
- [addDelayedJob-6](features/scheduling.md#adddelayedjob-6) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.enqueue_at/5`+`enqueue_in/5` (`@schedule`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/addDelayedJob-6.lua) ┬╖ also admission ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [changeDelay-4](features/scheduling.md#changedelay-4) тАФ NOT YET ┬╖ `reschedule/4` (proposed) ┬╖ [v1](registry/changeDelay-4.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [promote-9](features/scheduling.md#promote-9) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Jobs.promote/3` (`@promote`, due-sweep) + `promote_now/3` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/promote-9.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1

## repeat
- [addRepeatableJob-2](features/repeat.md#addrepeatablejob-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Repeat.register/6` (`@repeat_register`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/addRepeatableJob-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [addJobScheduler-11](features/repeat.md#addjobscheduler-11) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Repeat.register/6` + `Pump` ┬╖ [v1](registry/addJobScheduler-11.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [getJobScheduler-1](features/repeat.md#getjobscheduler-1) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Repeat.get/3` (proposed) ┬╖ [v1](registry/getJobScheduler-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [removeJobScheduler-3](features/repeat.md#removejobscheduler-3) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Repeat.cancel/3` (`@repeat_cancel`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/removeJobScheduler-3.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [updateJobScheduler-12](features/repeat.md#updatejobscheduler-12) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Repeat.advance/4` (`@repeat_advance`) + `Pump` ┬╖ [v1](registry/updateJobScheduler-12.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [updateRepeatableJobMillis-1](features/repeat.md#updaterepeatablejobmillis-1) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ folds into `Repeat.advance/4` ┬╖ [v1](registry/updateRepeatableJobMillis-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [removeRepeatable-3](features/repeat.md#removerepeatable-3) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Repeat.cancel/3` ┬╖ [v1](registry/removeRepeatable-3.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1

## claim
- [moveToActive-11](features/claim.md#movetoactive-11) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.claim/4` (`@claim`) + `Lanes.claim/3` (`@gclaim`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveToActive-11.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.0
- [moveJobFromActiveToWait-9](features/claim.md#movejobfromactivetowait-9) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Jobs.reap/2` (recovery); token-fenced `requeue` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveJobFromActiveToWait-9.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.0
- [moveStalledJobsToWait-8](features/claim.md#movestalledjobstowait-8) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Stalled.check/3` (`@sweep_stalled`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveStalledJobsToWait-8.lua) ┬╖ also locks ┬╖ rung emq.2.3

## retry
- [retryJob-11](features/retry.md#retryjob-11) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Jobs.retry/7` (`@retry`) + `reprocess_job/3`; `requeue_active/4` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/retryJob-11.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [reprocessJob-8](features/retry.md#reprocessjob-8) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.reprocess_job/3` (`@reprocess`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/reprocessJob-8.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1
- [moveToDelayed-8](features/retry.md#movetodelayed-8) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.retry/7` scheduled arm (`@retry`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveToDelayed-8.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.1

## flows
- [addParentJob-6](features/flows.md#addparentjob-6) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Flows.add/3`+`add_bulk/3` (`@enqueue_flow`/`@hold_parent`/`@enqueue_flow_child`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/addParentJob-6.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.3.1
- [moveToFinished-14](features/flows.md#movetofinished-14) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.complete/5` (`@complete`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveToFinished-14.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.3.1
- [moveToWaitingChildren-7](features/flows.md#movetowaitingchildren-7) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Flows`/`@complete` fan-in; `await_children/тАж` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveToWaitingChildren-7.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.3.1
- [getDependencyCounts-4](features/flows.md#getdependencycounts-4) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Flows.dependencies/3`; `child_counts/3` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/getDependencyCounts-4.lua) ┬╖ also metrics ┬╖ rung emq.3.1
- [grandchildren-recursive-flow-tree](features/flows.md#grandchildren-recursive-flow-tree) тАФ BUILDING ┬╖ emq.3.5 Arm A (no raw v1; recursive depth) ┬╖ rung emq.3.5

## groups
- [addPrioritizedJob-9](features/groups.md#addprioritizedjob-9) тАФ SHIPPED (re-aimed) ┬╖ `Lanes.enqueue/5` (`@genqueue`), no `prioritized` set ┬╖ [v1](registry/addPrioritizedJob-9.lua) ┬╖ also admission ┬╖ rung emq.0
- [changePriority-7](features/groups.md#changepriority-7) тАФ RETIRED ┬╖ `Lanes` re-assignment (emq.4) ┬╖ [v1](registry/changePriority-7.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.4
- [getCountsPerPriority-4](features/groups.md#getcountsperpriority-4) тАФ RETIRED ┬╖ `Metrics.lane_depths/3` ┬╖ [v1](registry/getCountsPerPriority-4.lua) ┬╖ also metrics ┬╖ rung emq.4

## batches
- [add_bulk](features/batches.md#add_bulk) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Flows.add_bulk/3` + `Jobs.enqueue_many/3` (no raw v1; flow parity) ┬╖ rung emq.3.4
- [moveJobsToWait-8](features/batches.md#movejobstowait-8) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ bulk `requeue_set(state,count)` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/moveJobsToWait-8.lua) ┬╖ also claim ┬╖ rung emq.5
- [cleanJobsInSet-3](features/lifecycle.md#cleanjobsinset-3) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Admin.clean/4` (proposed) ┬╖ [v1](registry/cleanJobsInSet-3.lua) ┬╖ primary in lifecycle ┬╖ rung emq.6

## locks
- [extendLock-2](features/locks.md#extendlock-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.extend_lock/5` (`@extend_lock`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/extendLock-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.3

- [releaseLock-1](features/locks.md#releaselock-1) тАФ SHIPPED (re-split) ┬╖ `Locks.untrack_job/2` ┬╖ [v1](registry/releaseLock-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.3

## metrics
- [getCounts-1](features/metrics.md#getcounts-1) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Metrics.get_counts/3` (`@counts`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/getCounts-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [getState-8](features/metrics.md#getstate-8) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Metrics.get_job_state/3` (`@state_lookup`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/getState-8.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [getStateV2-8](features/metrics.md#getstatev2-8) тАФ SHIPPED (subsumed) ┬╖ `Metrics.get_job_state/3` ┬╖ [v1](registry/getStateV2-8.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [getMetrics-2](features/metrics.md#getmetrics-2) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Metrics.get_metrics/3` (counter; `:data` ring + Prometheus тЖТ emq.8) ┬╖ [v1](registry/getMetrics-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [getRanges-1](features/metrics.md#getranges-1) тАФ NOT YET ┬╖ per-state windowed browse (`Jobs.browse/3` + `ZRANGE`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/getRanges-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.8
- [getRateLimitTtl-2](features/metrics.md#getratelimitttl-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Metrics.get_rate_limit_ttl/3` (`@rate_ttl`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/getRateLimitTtl-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [isMaxed-2](features/metrics.md#ismaxed-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Metrics.is_maxed/2` (`@is_maxed`, `EMQRATE`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/isMaxed-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [isFinished-3](features/metrics.md#isfinished-3) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `finished?/3` over `get_job_state/3` (only `dead` retained) ┬╖ [v1](registry/isFinished-3.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.1
- [isJobInList-1](features/metrics.md#isjobinlist-1) тАФ NOT YET ┬╖ O(log n) `ZSCORE` membership ┬╖ [v1](registry/isJobInList-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.8
- [paginate-1](features/metrics.md#paginate-1) тАФ NOT YET ┬╖ order-theorem browse (REV BYLEX) + `HSCAN`; `XRANGE` forward ┬╖ [v1](registry/paginate-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.8

## data
- [updateData-1](features/data.md#updatedata-1) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.update_data/4` (`@update_data`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/updateData-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
- [updateProgress-3](features/data.md#updateprogress-3) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.update_progress/4` (`@update_progress`, `PUBLISH`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/updateProgress-3.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
- [addLog-2](features/data.md#addlog-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.add_log/5`+`get_job_logs/3` (`@add_log`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/addLog-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
- [saveStacktrace-1](features/data.md#savestacktrace-1) тАФ NOT YET (folded) ┬╖ `last_error` field today; `@save_stacktrace` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/saveStacktrace-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.8

## lifecycle
- [removeJob-2](features/lifecycle.md#removejob-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Jobs.remove_job/4` (`@remove_job`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/removeJob-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
- [removeChildDependency-1](features/lifecycle.md#removechilddependency-1) тАФ NOT YET ┬╖ `Flows.drop_dependency/3` (proposed) ┬╖ [v1](registry/removeChildDependency-1.lua) ┬╖ also flows ┬╖ rung emq.6
- [removeDeduplicationKey-1](features/lifecycle.md#removededuplicationkey-1) тАФ PARTIAL (folded) ┬╖ `@remove_job` `de:` branch; `release_dedup/3` proposed ┬╖ [v1](registry/removeDeduplicationKey-1.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.6
- [removeUnprocessedChildren-2](features/lifecycle.md#removeunprocessedchildren-2) тАФ NOT YET ┬╖ `Flows.remove_children/3` (proposed, FLAT first) ┬╖ [v1](registry/removeUnprocessedChildren-2.lua) ┬╖ also flows ┬╖ rung emq.6
- [cleanJobsInSet-3](features/lifecycle.md#cleanjobsinset-3) тАФ PARTIAL ┬╖ `Admin.clean/4` (proposed) ┬╖ [v1](registry/cleanJobsInSet-3.lua) ┬╖ also batches ┬╖ rung emq.6
- [drain-5](features/lifecycle.md#drain-5) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Admin.drain/3` (`@drain`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/drain-5.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
- [obliterate-2](features/lifecycle.md#obliterate-2) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Admin.obliterate/3` (`@obliterate`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/obliterate-2.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
- [pause-7](features/lifecycle.md#pause-7) тАФ SHIPPED ┬╖ `Admin.pause/2`+`resume/2` (`@pause`/`@resume`) ┬╖ [v1](registry/pause-7.lua) ┬╖ rung emq.2.2
